# swell — raw outputs

Raw, unedited outputs from the swell flow land in this folder per the [bake-off brief](../../brief.md).

Required files (per brief):

- `transcript.<ext>`
- `show-notes.md`
- `pull-quotes.md`
- `social-posts.md`
- `newsletter-teaser.md`
- `clips/clip-01.<ext>`, `clip-02.<ext>`, `clip-03.<ext>`
- `manifest.json` (schema in brief.md)

**Do not edit outputs after capture.** If a tool refused to produce a deliverable, leave it absent and note it in `manifest.json` and in [`log.md`](../../log.md).
